basic_details.job_title: Mumbai University CEBS Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply for 14 Assistant Professor, Reader & Associate Professor Posts
basic_details.short_information: The University of Mumbai - Department of Atomic Energy Centre for Excellence in Basic Sciences (UM-DAE CEBS) has released Advt. No. CEBS/Faculty/01/2026 on June 1, 2026, inviting online applications from eligible Indian Nationals for 14 faculty positions - Assistant Professor (7), Reader (4), and Associate Professor (3) - across Biology, Chemistry, Mathematics, and Physics. The last date to apply is July 15, 2026. All posts carry 7th CPC academic pay scales with Central Government allowances.

age_limit.details: Post Maximum Age Assistant Professor 35 years Reader 38 years Associate Professor 43 years

qualification.details: Candidates wondering about eligibility can note that all three posts require a Ph.D. in the relevant subject area with at least 60% marks (or equivalent) at the Master's level, but differ in the years of post-Ph.D. research experience required. | Note: Teaching experience is desirable for all three posts but is not a mandatory requirement.

salary_details.details: UM-DAE CEBS follows 7th CPC academic pay scales applicable to Central Government-aided institutions. All faculty members are also entitled to Dearness Allowance, House Rent Allowance, Transport Allowance, Children's Education Allowance, Pension Scheme, and Leave Travel Concession (LTC) as admissible for Central Government employees. | Additionally, faculty members are eligible for a Contributory Health Service Scheme (CHSS) as per DAE norms.

selection_process: Shortlisting and selection at UM-DAE CEBS is merit-based
driven by the quality of publications
and letters of recommendation - not just degree qualifications. The process runs in two rounds before final appointment.
Step 1 - Application Screening: A Screening Committee reviews applications based on peer-reviewed publications
and recommendation letters. Fulfilling minimum qualifications alone does not guarantee a call for interview.

Step 2 - Job Talk (Round 1): Shortlisted candidates are invited for an in-person job talk before the Selection Committee. Video-conference is available only for candidates based outside India who cannot attend in person. A separate merit list is created for each post code.
Step 3 - Final Interview (Round 2): Based on job talk performance
a limited number of candidates are invited for a second in-person interview before the Final Selection Committee. Video-conference is again available only for overseas-based candidates.

Travel Reimbursement: Candidates attending the final interview in India are reimbursed a maximum 2-tier AC train fare (or equivalent) via the shortest route from their place of residence to Mumbai and back. Daily allowance and local travel are not covered.
Step 4 - Appointment: Initial appointment is for 5 years (including a 1-year probation period). After a review
confirmed employees continue until superannuation at age 62
extendable to 65 by the Governing Council.
how_to_apply: Applicants must complete all three steps - online form, data upload, and hard copy dispatch - before the July 15, 2026 deadline.
Download the Application Template from https://www.cbs.ac.in/announcements/recruitment and fill it out completely.
Compile a single PDF (not exceeding 10 MB) containing the filled application form and all supporting documents.
Submit the Online Data Form at https://forms.gle/BW9EjubEzxA2fYAG7, uploading the PDF compiled in Step 2.

Arrange Three Recommendation Letters - preferably from (i) Ph.D. Supervisor, (ii) Postdoc Supervisor, and (iii) an external subject expert. Referees must email their signed, confidential letters directly to [email protected], with the subject line: Recommendation Letter for [Candidate Full Name], [Post Code] (e.g., Recommendation Letter for Rajesh Mishra, B03).

Send a Signed Hard Copy of the application along with all enclosures by post to: Dean (Academic Affairs) Nalanda Building, UM-DAE Centre for Excellence in Basic Sciences University of Mumbai, Vidyanagari Campus Santacruz (East), Mumbai 400098, INDIA The hard copy must also reach by July 15, 2026. UM-DAE CEBS is not responsible for postal delays.

all_official_links.label: Mumbai University CEBS Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for UM-DAE CEBS Faculty Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit both the online application form and the signed hard copy is July 15, 2026. Candidates must ensure both reach UM-DAE CEBS on or before this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there in UM-DAE CEBS Faculty Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 14 vacancies — 7 for Assistant Professor, 4 for Reader, and 3 for Associate Professor — across the Schools of Biological Sciences, Chemical Sciences, Mathematical Sciences, and Physical Sciences.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required to apply?
faq.answer: All posts require a Ph.D. in the relevant subject area (Biology, Chemistry, Mathematics, or Physics) with at least 60% marks or equivalent at the Master's level. The required post-Ph.D. experience varies: 2 years for Assistant Professor, 5 years for Reader, and 10 years for Associate Professor.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for each post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit as of July 15, 2026 is 35 years for Assistant Professor, 38 years for Reader, and 43 years for Associate Professor.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee?
faq.answer: The official advertisement does not mention any application fee. Candidates should verify this on the official website www.cbs.ac.in before applying.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary for the Associate Professor post?
faq.answer: The Associate Professor post carries Academic Pay Level-13A with an entry pay of Rs. 1,31,100 – Rs. 2,16,600/-, along with Central Government allowances including HRA, DA, LTC, and CHSS medical benefits.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for UM-DAE CEBS Faculty Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Selection involves two rounds: first, an in-person job talk before a Screening Committee; then, based on performance, a final in-person interview before the Final Selection Committee. A separate merit list is prepared for each post code.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for UM-DAE CEBS Faculty Recruitment 2026?
